message:
Harden core infrastructure with speculative pipeline support and edge-case tests

Core infrastructure changes spanning error handling, logging, CLI,
model types, storage, main entrypoint, and process documentation:

error.rs:
- Add exhaustive error_code regression matrix test covering all 12
  FwError variants to prevent accidental error code drift
- Add std::error::Error source chain tests for Io and Json variants
- Add Debug format variant name verification tests
- Add error_code vs robot_error_code namespace disjointness assertion
- Add special-character preservation test for CommandFailed stderr

logging.rs:
- Add default info-level filter parsing validation test
- Add multi-target EnvFilter compound directive test to verify
  user-provided RUST_LOG values don't panic

main.rs:
- Separate Plain and Json output format handling for `runs --id` to
  show raw transcript text for Plain format instead of JSON
- Replace manual JSON frame construction for Eof/Reset control frames
  with structured `emit_session_close()` calls using SessionCloseReason
  enum, improving protocol consistency and reducing code duplication

process.rs:
- Fix documentation comment: s/pcx.checkpoint()/token.checkpoint()/
  to match actual parameter name in cancellation-aware polling

model.rs:
- Add serde round-trip and unknown-value rejection tests for
  DeviceMapStrategy enum
- Add WordTimestampParams default values and serde(default) behavior
  tests
- Add InsanelyFastTuningParams serialization round-trip tests
- Add diarization pipeline extension struct (AlignmentConfig,
  PunctuationConfig, SourceSeparationConfig) default and serde tests
- Add BackendParams extension fields round-trip integration test

storage.rs:
- Add concurrent session name validation tests (hyphens, spaces,
  dots, unicode rejected; underscores accepted)
- Add StorageDiagnostics Clone/Debug derive verification
- Add is_busy_storage_error substring matching edge-case tests
- Add optional_text, optional_float, text_value helper tests
- Add parse_backend exhaustive variant mapping test
- Add value_to_string negative float tests with parse-back verification
- Add pragma_integer nonexistent pragma fallback-to-zero test
- Add concurrent session execute_with_params invalid SQL error test
- Add value_to_i64 MIN boundary and text representation test
- Add RunStore diagnostics expected-keys integrity test

cli.rs:
- Add --speculative flag and associated CLI arguments (--fast-model,
  --quality-model, --speculative-window-ms, --speculative-overlap-ms,
  --correction-tolerance-wer, --no-adaptive, --always-correct) with
  clap `requires` constraints ensuring sub-flags require --speculative
- Add to_speculative_config() builder method that constructs
  SpeculativeConfig from CLI arguments with sensible defaults
- Add speculative field to robot_summary JSON output
- Update minimal_args test helper with new speculative fields
- Add comprehensive CLI parsing and config building tests for all
  speculative flag combinations
- Add RunsOutputFormat variant distinctness test
- Add tty-audio decode/control CLI parsing tests (ack, retransmit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
